rationale: Legal name of the foreign LP in its home jurisdiction. Per the entity-name-vs-home-jurisdiction convention, foreign-qualification/registration forms use entity.home_jurisdiction_name (matches MBCA-2, MLLC-12, MLLP-2).
Independent checkbox (on-state Yes) verified by geometry+text on page 0 (y=361.0); enum_select value 'new'. Radio option for 'new' registration. Enum value: 'new'. Mutually exclusive with Check Box3.
Independent checkbox (on-state Yes) verified by geometry+text on page 0 (y=361.0); enum_select value 'renewal'. Radio option for 'renewal'. Enum value: 'renewal'. Mutually exclusive with Check Box2.

label_verbatim: SECOND: The state or country under the laws of which it is organized is
rationale: Home state or country of organization. Same key as MBCA-2's 'state or country under the laws of which it is incorporated' and MLLC-12's 'Jurisdiction where formed'.

label_verbatim: SECOND: ...the address of its principal office is located at: (line 1)
rationale: First line of principal-office address (street). Two-widget split variant — same shape as MBCA-2's 2Five. The '(street, city, state and zip code)' label below the second line confirms the line-1 / line-2 split.
Second line of principal-office address (city/state/zip). The '(street, city, state and zip code)' label appears below this widget — same split convention as MBCA-2's 2Six.

label_verbatim: THIRD: The date of its organization is
rationale: Date the foreign LP was originally organized in its home jurisdiction. Matches MBCA-2 'date of incorporation' and MLLC-12 'date of formation' — semantically the home-state organization date.

label_verbatim: FOURTH: A brief statement of the nature of the limited partnership's business:
rationale: Free-text description of the LP's business — UNSCOPED (asks about the partnership's business generally, not Maine activities). The page-1 footer explicitly states 'The filing of this application does not authorize a limited partnership to do business in Maine,' confirming this is the unscoped business_purpose, not the Maine-scoped maine_business_purpose used by MLLC-12. Reuses MBCA-2's entity.business_purpose.
Date of signature.

label_verbatim: *By ___ (signature of a general partner) / (type or print name and capacity)
rationale: Combined printed-name-and-capacity widget for the signing general partner. Shape D (matches MBCA-2, MBCA-11, MLLC-12, MBCA-12B). The (signature of a general partner) line above is wet-ink only with no AcroForm widget.

label_verbatim: Name of entity(s) on the submitted filings [1]
rationale: Cover-letter row 1 (cover-letter primitive). Typically populated with entity.home_jurisdiction_name.

widget_id: Name of entitys on the submitted filings 2
rationale: Cover-letter row 2. Field-id has typo 'entitys' (no apostrophe) preserved upstream.

label_verbatim: Hold attested copy for pick up
rationale: Expedite tier 'hold_for_pickup'.
Expedite tier '24h_next_business_day'.
Expedite tier 'immediate_same_day'.
Total fees ($20/month for 'new' prorated through calendar year, or $200 flat for 'renewal' per page-0 header, plus expedite premium).
Contact name.
Contact phone.

widget_id: Contact email address for this filing
rationale: Filing-specific contact email.

widget_id: Email address to use for annual report reminders
label_verbatim: (Email address to use for annual report reminders)
rationale: Annual-report reminder email — name registration does not create an annual-report obligation, but the cover-letter primitive includes it. Typically left blank.
Recipient name.
Recipient firm.
Recipient street.
Recipient city/state/zip combined. Field-id has double-space ('City State  Zip') preserved upstream.
